title: 3pcs Cake Tins, Non Stick Baking Tins, Spring Form Round, Cake Mould 24cm, 26cm & 28cm with Removable Bottom
features: Spring Form Cake Tins: Set of 3, (24cm, 26cm & 28cm); round shape; non-stick and leak-proof, easy to make and clean; perfect for creating double-tiered or three-tiered wedding cake birthday cakes.

High Quality Springform Cake Tin--Made of premium carbon steel and reinforced coating, BPA and PEOA free, 100% safe and healthy. Heat-resistance temperature: 230℃ /445℉, Microwave oven safe, and heat more evenly.

3-pack springform pan fills your recipe with more possibilities. 24cm small springform pan is great for making mini cake, quiche and more. 26cm and 28cm springform pan fits for making cheesecake, fruitcake, torte and more. You can use them together to create beautiful double or three layers cakes

Usage: Our cake baking tins can be used professionally and on different occasions at homes, such as birthday parties, Valentine’s Day, Christmas, and other festivals, to make different variations of Cheesecakes, Rainbow cake, etc.

Non-stick & Leak proof Baking Pan: A cake tin with a non-stick base can quickly release the cake more cleanly without destroying the shape. The latch of the tin can smoothly open and close. The bottom pan is removable and easy to clean for next time use.
description: Product Description Elevate your baking experience with our versatile set of 3pcs Cake Tins. These round springform pans come in three convenient sizes - 24cm, 26cm, and 28cm - perfect for creating a variety of delicious cakes and desserts. The removable bottom and spring-loaded latch make it simple to unmould your creations without compromising their shape or appearance. From cheesecakes to fruitcakes, quiches to tortes, these versatile pans open up a world of culinary possibilities. Use them individually for everyday baking or combine them to create stunning double or triple-layer cakes for special occasions. Whether you're a professional baker or an enthusiastic home cook, these cake tins are suitable for various events and celebrations. From birthdays and holidays to weddings and casual gatherings, you'll find countless opportunities to put these pans to good use. 3pcs Cake Tins - Whether you're whipping up a single-layer treat or an impressive multi-tiered masterpiece, these cake tins have got you covered. Crafted with care, our cake tins feature a durable construction and a non-stick coating that ensures easy release and effortless cleaning. From cheesecakes to fruitcakes, quiches to tortes, these versatile pans open up a world of culinary possibilities. Use them individually for everyday baking or combine them to create stunning double or triple-layer cakes for special occasions.
